# Nizamettin Şimşek

> Frontend Developer at Let Wash (Palo Alto). Portfolio, projects, and technical blog.

## About

Nizamettin Şimşek is a Frontend Developer at Let Wash, where he architects and builds the multi-role SaaS web platform. He works with React, Vite, TypeScript, TanStack Router, TanStack Query, and Tailwind CSS.

Previously: DNSSense (frontend), Mayadem / ÇokNet (React Query, GraphQL), KCTEK / Qulak (WebRTC, online exam security).

## Key pages

- [Home](https://nizamettinsimsek.com.tr/): Portfolio — experience, projects, tech stack, contact
- [Blog](https://nizamettinsimsek.com.tr/blogs): Technical articles on frontend, WebRTC, React Query, startups
- [Let Wash blog post](https://nizamettinsimsek.com.tr/blogs/startup-frontend-mimarisi-let-wash): Multi-role SaaS frontend architecture (Root, Carwash Owner, Carwash Admin, Washer)

## Blog posts

- [Online Exam Security with WebRTC & WebSocket](https://nizamettinsimsek.com.tr/blogs/online-sinav-guvenligi-webrtc-websocket)
- [Frontend Data Management with React Query](https://nizamettinsimsek.com.tr/blogs/react-query-ile-frontend-veri-yonetimi)
- [Startup Frontend Architecture at Let Wash](https://nizamettinsimsek.com.tr/blogs/startup-frontend-mimarisi-let-wash)
- [Real-Time Communication with WebRTC](https://nizamettinsimsek.com.tr/blogs/webrtc-ile-gercek-zamanli-iletisim-platformlari)
